signals.reasoning: SOL still looks constructive on the rebound, but funding is positive and the move is already well underway. It is not a clean fresh long and not a compelling short either.
BTC remains trend-supported, but after the breakout and with macro still RED I would rather not chase a fresh long at this level.
ETH is one of the stronger structures on the board, with price and open interest both expanding and no obvious sign of exhaustion yet. Confidence is reduced because macro still caps long aggression.
LDO still has strong continuation structure, but it is already extended after the rebound and no longer offers an especially clean new entry.
TST is still an active squeeze continuation name, but the move is already too crowded and too stretched to chase cleanly.
ZEREBRO has upside momentum, but the supporting open-interest edge is too weak to justify a fresh trade from here.
KNEIRO has positive price action, but the setup is too incomplete and too extended to trust as a new entry.
XPL has rebound momentum, but the open-interest history is too incomplete to make the move trustworthy as a fresh long.
FARTCOIN still trends higher, but positive funding and a strong prior squeeze make it too crowded to upgrade now.
MON has continuation structure, but the move already looks crowded and does not stand out as a clean fresh long.
BOME is moving up with the board, but the setup quality is too thin and too incomplete to force a trade.
STABLE has strong negative-funding squeeze fuel, but price is still weak and open interest says fresh shorts are pressing. It is interesting, but not clean enough yet.
SYRUP remains a no-trade name on the board. The signal quality is not high enough to justify action.
CHILLGUY looks more like a short-covering rally than a clean trend continuation, so I would keep it watch-only.
PNUT has upside momentum, but the structure is too incomplete and too extended to justify a fresh long here.

SUPER is a valid secondary squeeze-long candidate because funding is still negative and expected to stay soft while price remains constructive. Confidence stays capped because open-interest support is incomplete and macro is still RED.
JTO is the cleanest long on the board because it combines clearly negative funding with rising price and open interest, which is the best remaining squeeze-plus-structure setup in this batch.
WCT still has constructive continuation structure, but the move is already too developed to qualify as a clean fresh long.
ALGO has upside momentum, but the supporting data is too incomplete to make it a high-quality new signal.
ORDI still has decent momentum and improving funding, but the setup is already extended and not as clean as JTO or even ETH.
